description_long: This refrigerator features a tall, rectangular form with a modern, minimalist design. The front is divided into two upper doors and three lower drawers, all finished in a muted mauve or light brown color with subtle horizontal texture. A vertical, rectangular handle is integrated into the right door, and a small label or sticker is visible near the top. The sides and back are a solid gray, with the rear panel featuring a vented grille at the bottom for airflow and a warning label. The top of the refrigerator is flat, with a slightly raised section, likely for ventilation or access to internal components. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A tall, modern refrigerator with two upper doors, three lower drawers, and a sleek mauve finish. The design is minimalist with integrated handles and a vented rear panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing two upper doors, three lower drawers, an integrated vertical handle, and a small label near the top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, solid gray surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large vented grille at the bottom, a warning label, and a flat, unadorned surface.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain gray surface and no visible features.
attribute_door_handle_style: Integrated vertical handle on the right door, flush with the surface for a minimalist look.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Horizontal slats on a rectangular grille located at the bottom of the rear panel.
